intro_zh: 先听完整课文，再把“刚丢钱 -> 很 upset -> 经理 sympathetic 但帮不上 -> 抱怨被敲门打断 -> 信封归还 -> honesty still exists”这条反转读顺。

sentences.text: I entered the hotel manager's office and sat down.
sentences.focus_zh: hotel manager's office 是酒店经理办公室，也可以联想到前台、服务台或失物招领。

sentences.text: I had just lost $50 and I felt very upset.
sentences.focus_zh: had just lost 表示坏事刚刚发生；upset 是烦恼、难过、担心。

sentences.text: 'I left the money in my room,' I said, 'and it's not there now.'
sentences.focus_zh: left the money 是更早的动作；it's not there now 是现在发现钱不在了。

sentences.text: The manager was sympathetic, but he could do nothing.
sentences.focus_zh: sympathetic 是理解和同情；could do nothing 是当时没有办法帮忙。

sentences.text: He started to complain about this wicked world but was interrupted by a knock at the door.
sentences.focus_zh: wicked world 是夸张抱怨；was interrupted by 是被敲门声打断，反转从这里开始。

sentences.text: A girl came in and put an envelope on his desk.
sentences.focus_zh: envelope 是信封，故事里它是归还丢失钱的关键物件。
contained 是里面装着；这句话揭示信封里正是丢失的钱。

sentences.text: 'Well,' I said to the manager, 'there is still some honesty in this world!'
sentences.focus_zh: still some honesty 是结尾的亮点：世界没有经理刚才说得那么坏。
